de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class NameAbstractionTable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.NameAbstractionTable
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    JavaProgramElement.NameAbstractionTableDisabled

    public class NameAbstractionTable
extends Object
    This class is used for the equals modulo renaming method in SourceElement. The purpose of this class is to abstract from names. Therefore it represents a mapping o1 x o2 -> abstractName where o1, o2 are of the same type (Label or ProgramVariable). The objectif is that the comparing method uses this new name for o1 and o2 instead of their real name. For this comparision a method is offered so that the assigned name is not given outside.

      The order in which symbols are declared in the two terms or programs that are compared.

    • Field Detail

      • declarations0

        private List<SourceElement> declarations0
        The order in which symbols are declared in the two terms or programs that are compared. The latest declaration of a symbol will be the first matching entry in the list

      • declarations1

        private List<SourceElement> declarations1
        The order in which symbols are declared in the two terms or programs that are compared. The latest declaration of a symbol will be the first matching entry in the list

        public boolean sameAbstractName(SourceElement pe0,
                                SourceElement pe1)

        pe1 - SourceElement
